theme: Berlin guest list (sample edition — rename to today's UTC date to go live)
settingLine: Berlin, not London. Same flaky group-chat energy; U-Bahn and Kiez instead of the Tube.

occasion.name: Rooftop Sundown
occasion.note: Weather-dependent. If it rains, the plan becomes 'somewhere inside' and nobody agrees where for 48 hours.

characters.name: Tom
characters.personality: Works at a startup that's 'about to close a round'. Will reply 'on it' and then disappear for three days.
characters.linguisticFingerprint: MAX 6 words per message. No punctuation except a full stop sometimes. No emoji. Flat Berlin tech energy.

characters.name: Zara
characters.personality: Treats anything past Ringbahn as a expedition. Will ask if there's an U-Bahn within guilt distance.
characters.linguisticFingerprint: Mentions U-Bahn lines and Kiez drama. Theatrical about travel time. Never a plain yes.

characters.name: Marcus
characters.personality: The one who actually reads the venue FAQ. Sends a screenshot of the door policy. Still somehow unsure if he's in.
characters.linguisticFingerprint: Full sentences. No emoji. One clarifying question per message. Unsettlingly prepared.

characters.name: Bex
characters.personality: Will bring someone nobody has met. That person has strong opinions about the playlist.
characters.linguisticFingerprint: Warm, rapid-fire short texts. Uses people's names. Asks if she can bring someone in message two.

characters.name: Hamish
characters.personality: Claims he lives in Berlin but is in Glasgow this week. And last week. Replies 'aye' or nothing.
characters.linguisticFingerprint: 1–3 words only. Scottish particles. Never explains.

characters.name: Nadia
characters.personality: Sound bath at 8. Cold plunge evangelist. In principle always free; in practice never.
characters.linguisticFingerprint: Wellness jargon. Commits in theory, blocks in practice. One nature emoji max per message.
